narrative:
Precinct Liberty East (precinct in Ross County) has 688 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
